_comment: HIL job: build WipperSnapper Arduino with PlatformIO, flash to device, run protoMQ display test. Target: Feather ESP32-S3 + FeatherWing OLED 128x32 (SSD1306, Adafruit #2900). Replace __placeholders__ before submitting, or use scripts/submit-arduino-display-test.sh.

setup: git clone --depth 1 --branch __PROTOMQ_REF__ __PROTOMQ_REPO__ protomq && pip install platformio && pio run -e adafruit_feather_esp32s3 && pio run -e adafruit_feather_esp32s3 --target upload --upload-port __SERIAL_PORT__ && pip install -e . && pip install -e protomq/ && envsubst < examples/wippersnapper-arduino/secrets.example.json > .pio/build/adafruit_feather_esp32s3/secrets.json

args: python -m pytest tests/display/ -v --tb=short -m 'ssd1306 or oled or display' 2>&1 | tee /tmp/hil-display-test.log; exit ${PIPESTATUS[0]}
